productName: Dungeness Dank - Hash ROSIN 1g - PERMANENT MARKER - 1g
description: A purist's hybrid hash rosin: Permanent Marker refined first into full-melt hash, then squeezed solventless under heat and pressure for the cleanest, most flavorful dab going. Maximum flavor, zero solvents, with notes of ammonia, chemical, and tobacco, and a balanced head-and-body experience.
